nasb.text: The priest shall take cedar wood and hyssop and scarlet material and cast it into the midst of the burning heifer.

esv.text: And the priest shall take cedarwood and hyssop and scarlet yarn, and throw them into the fire burning the heifer.

cnv.text: 祭司要把香柏木、牛膝草、朱紅色線，都丟在燒牛的火中。

ccb.text: 祭司要把香柏木、牛膝草、朱红色线扔进烧牛的火里。
